fields.description: Inherits provider default when session is created. If empty, no system prompt will be used.
fields.label: System Prompt

fields.description: Cross-session context injected at session creation for continuity. Stored separately to keep system_prompt clean.
fields.label: Cross Session Context

fields.description: Temperature override for this session (0‑1.5). Recommended values: Coding/Math: 0.0, Data Cleaning/Analysis: 1.0, General Conversation/Translation: 1.3, Creative Writing/Poetry: 1.5. Leave empty to use provider default.
fields.label: Temperature

fields.description: Automatically generate follow-up question suggestions after each agent response. Inherited from the LLM Provider setting when session is created.
fields.label: Enable Follow-up Suggestions

fields.description: Enable streaming responses for this session. Requires provider to support streaming.
fields.label: Enable Streaming

fields.description: Override thinking mode for this session. When checked, enables thinking regardless of provider setting. When unchecked, inherits from LLM Provider.
fields.label: Override Thinking Mode

fields.description: Temporary session — auto-deleted when you navigate away. Messages, memories, and tool approvals are removed on deletion.
fields.label: Temporary Session

fields.description: Persistent state for agent session (memory, skills, RAG context)
fields.label: Session State

fields.description: When session state was last updated
fields.label: Last State Update

fields.description: Running total of tokens in current conversation context (since last summary)
fields.label: Estimated Conversation Tokens

fields.description: Reference to the most recent summary message
fields.label: Last Summary Message

fields.description: Whether 75% context limit warning has been shown
fields.label: Token Warning Sent
